title: viola sheltonii
intro: Viola sheltonii, also known as Shelton's pansy or Shelton's violet, is a species of flowering plant in the family Violaceae. The plant's leaves, flowers, and roots have been used in traditional medicine for their medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antiviral effects. The health benefits of Viola sheltonii include relief from sore throats, coughs, and respiratory issues, as well as its potential to reduce inflammation and improve wound healing. Herbal preparations of Viola sheltonii include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used topically or internally to harness its medicinal properties.
